title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ST MATTHEW HILLSBORO UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited financial assistance with utility bills (electric, natural gas, and water) depending on funds available. Maximum assistance of $400 in a 12 month period per applicant. 475 SE 3rd Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Low income households who live within the parish boundaries and have a utility bill in the applicant's name Hours: Visit website first day of the month at 12:01am until capacity is reached. Capacity can be reached within a few hours. Email (503) 693-7528 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 693-7528 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to submit online application during service hours or for more information. If a temporarily suspended screen appears, this means they are not accepting applications. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Copy of utility bill, photo ID, income documents LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Cornelius, Hillsboro, and North Plains SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-11:30am TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across 3rd Avenue from St Matthew Catholic Church Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - ST VINCENT DE PAUL FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL ST MATTHEW HILLSBORO
